input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.1.4
            TITLE: all accumulator segments and/or accumulator containers (including spares and replacement

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.1.4: All Accumulator Segments and/or Accumulator Containers (including spares and replacement
EV.5.1.4 All Accumulator Segments and/or Accumulator Containers (including spares and replacement 
parts) must be identical to the design documented in the ESF and SES

final_answer: All Accumulator Segments and/or Accumulator Containers (including spares and replacement parts) must be identical to the design documented in the ESF and SES
